name: vidu-video-skill
description: AI agent skill for video generation powered by Vidu models (Q3-Pro, Q3-Turbo, Reference-to-Video) via Atlas Cloud API. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, and 15+ AI coding agents. Text-to-video, image-to-video, start-end frame, anime style, audio generation, 1080p.
